name: Street Fighter
description: Capcom's flagship fighting game series, centered on martial artists from around the world and one-on-one competitive play.

eras.title: Arcade Foundation Era
eras.description: The original Street Fighter establishes the martial-arts tournament premise before the sequel defines the genre.

eras.title: Street Fighter II Era
eras.description: Street Fighter II and its revisions turn the series into the defining competitive fighting game franchise.

eras.title: Alpha and III Era
eras.description: Alpha expands the series' style and roster while Street Fighter III pushes technical play and animation.

eras.title: Modern Revival Era
eras.description: Street Fighter IV revives mainstream fighting games, followed by modern competitive entries and esports support.
